experience.title: Full Stack Developer Intern
bullets: Developed production AI agent system for B2B order automation using Claude Sonnet and RAG across multi-channel interfaces (webhooks, WhatsApp, email, phone), processing 1,000+ orders for 7 enterprise clients

Built Python and React internal tools for data processing and operations: Intercom ticketing system (5+ min saved per request, 50+ customers), ERP sales order interface, and AWS S3 attachment store managing 250+ files

Engineered automated validation layer with human-in-the-loop QA to detect AI model failure modes; iterated on prompt engineering and vector-store correction memory to improve precision across 1,000+ production orders

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Developed Python abstraction layer over Grafanalib on 3-person team, achieving 83% code reduction (30+ lines to 5) for data visualization infrastructure
Migrated 7+ legacy dashboards across 3 active Grafana environments with comprehensive unit tests on the dashboard layer

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Building intelligent professor review platform serving 30,000+ students using TypeScript, React, Node.js, and Drizzle ORM for data processing and storage
Shipped review submission flow and developed Python GraphQL webscraper for automated course data ingestion and processing across agile sprints

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Linguistics

projects.name: Internship Matcher (React + TypeScript, FastAPI, Claude, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS S3)
bullets: Built production AI-powered matching system at internshipmatcher.com: React + TypeScript frontend, FastAPI backend, multi-tier data processing layer (PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS S3), and Clerk JWT authentication via JWKS

Designed dual-model AI pipeline using Claude (Haiku 4.5 for fast skill extraction, Sonnet 4.5 for deep re-ranking of top 30 to top 10) achieving 95%+ accuracy with SSE-streamed progress events to React frontend in real time
Optimized intelligent processing of 30+ positions with 52% latency reduction (270s to 130s) via dynamic batching and prompt caching

projects.name: Sleep-PSG Scoring (React, FastAPI, MNE, Scikit-Learn, Redis, WebSockets)
bullets: Developed automated machine learning platform for PSG sleep-stage scoring with 98% time reduction (2+ hrs to under 2 min) and 83% balanced accuracy, validated against clinician-labeled hypnograms from Sleep-EDF dataset
Built asynchronous data processing pipeline (Redis + ARQ) for distributed EDF parsing, spectral feature extraction, and Scikit-Learn classifier training per patient
Implemented sub-10ms WebSocket streaming to React dashboard rendering live EEG waveforms and hypnograms for QA review

projects.name: Cold Leads Agent (FastAPI, Claude Haiku + Sonnet, Cal.com, Linq, Postgres)
bullets: Deployed autonomous AI agent for lead-qualification SMS automation for Bay Area real estate client: FSM-driven pipeline with intent classification, debounce sweeper, and Cal.com auto-booking of qualified leads

Integrated multi-service data processing: HMAC-signed Linq SMS webhooks, Cal.com v2 booking API, SendGrid escalation; dual-model Claude (Haiku + Sonnet) on async Postgres with Alembic migrations and APScheduler
Live in production auto-booking qualified leads on Cal.com and saving ~5 hrs/week of manual outreach for client
